bio.text1: Yida Tsai is a multidisciplinary designer based in Taipei, working between visual design and digital experience. His practice spans from interface design to printed matter, exploring how ideas take form across different mediums.
bio.text2: With a foundation in visual communication and experience in both digital and editorial projects, he focuses on clarity, structure, and the translation of design into tangible outcomes.

items.title: Interface Design
items.desc: UI / UX design, layout systems, and interaction flow.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Frontend implementation with modern frameworks and responsive systems.

items.title: Brand & Visual Design
items.desc: Identity systems, typography, and visual language.

items.title: Editorial & Print
items.desc: Publication design, printed materials, and physical outputs.

items.title: Creative Direction
items.desc: Concept development, visual strategy, and cross-medium execution.

cards.title: GOODAY TUORS (Sun Day Tour Group) — Web Visual Design
cards.desc:
Responsible for the visual design and front-end development of travel campaign pages, and contributed to print and physical deliverables for premium group tours.
Integrating digital and print design, extending outcomes across multiple mediums.

cards.title: Front-End Engineering Training — III
cards.desc:
Completed intensive front-end training at the Institute for Information Industry (III), building a foundation in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.
Contributed to the Campmate e-commerce project, designing and implementing the homepage, coupon system, and admin tools.

cards.title: Real Estate Visual Design & Brand Integration
cards.desc:
Led visual and brand design for residential developments, including naming, sales center visuals, and promotional materials.
Developed integrated design experience across print and spatial environments.

cards.title: NTUA — Visual Communication Design
cards.desc:
Built a foundation in visual language and design principles.
Developed creative thinking and a systematic approach to design.

approach.title: Design Approach
approach.body1:
Design is shaped through the interplay
of typography, structure, and material.
approach.body2:
By balancing aesthetics and logic,
making each work more precise and meaningful.

field.tagline:
Multidisciplinary designer based in Taipei.
Focused on visual design and digital experience.
field.taglineSub: Through structure and systems, transforming concepts into perceptible design.

vision.subtitle: Where aesthetics, logic, and experience intersect

descriptions.1:
Every project starts with a clear concept.
It defines the direction, intention,
and narrative of the work.
descriptions.2:
Structure builds the visual foundation.
It organizes elements into a coherent
and functional system.
descriptions.3:
Material introduces texture and depth.
Through surface, light, and tactility,
the work gains physical presence.
descriptions.4:
Detail refines the final expression.
Precision in small elements reveals
the level of craftsmanship.
